positive: A minimalist, stylized graphic design featuring a celestial forest scene. Intricate, swirling roots and glowing bioluminescent flora frame a central silhouette of majestic, stylized deer leaping through the canopy. The composition is highly symmetrical, centered around a large, stylized crescent moon that acts as a backdrop. Use deep indigo and emerald tones accented by vibrant gold and neon cyan light sources. The style should be detailed vector illustration meets Art Nouveau engraving, featuring strong lines, dramatic contrast, and clean, solid color areas suitable for screen printing on t-shirts. Composition must be contained and non-busy, emphasizing the silhouette and negative space. High-contrast, clean edges, perfect symmetry.
negative: text, logo, signature, watermark, blurry, noise, artifacts, disfigured, lowres, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, photographic, messy, grain
